title: MagicalMechanica
description: Create and hexcasting, what could go wrong?
body:
# Introduction
Are you sick of Minecraft? Yes? well then you should then play another game...
But if you want a technical and magic Minecraft :sparkles: *experience* :sparkles:, you can check this modpack.

# What about it?
This modpack has Create and Hexcasting as main protagonists, adding several addons. It also adds two other big mods, CC: Tweaked and Zenith. While this mod is mainly focused on technical things over anything else, some other kinds of mods have been added, decoration mods, terrain generation mods and some new but few structures.

It also includes Figura, because why not.

# Performance
Well, it doesn't perform outstandinlly well, however, there are some optimization mods, like Sodium and Distant Horizons. I would recommend disabling or uninstalling the second if your pc is running poorly and you don't want a brutal view distance.

In my experiments this pack likes to eat lots of RAM, however it doesnt really need that much, so give it some extra RAM but not too much.

# Rebalancing
Not much, however there are some custom items and recipes to join and rebalance some mods. It also adds new structures for the same purpose.
